scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n plugins,web,electron "node scripts/plugins.mjs watch" "npm --silent run dev:web" "npm --silent run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://localhost:5180 && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:5180 electron ./dist-electron/electron/main.js
scripts.dev:reset: npm run clean:vite-cache && npm run dev
scripts.logs:show: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path logs/electron-runtime.log) { Get-Content logs/electron-runtime.log -Tail 200 } else { Write-Output 'No log file yet: logs/electron-runtime.log' }"
scripts.logs:tail: powershell -NoProfile -Command "if (Test-Path logs/electron-runtime.log) { Get-Content logs/electron-runtime.log -Tail 120 -Wait } else { Write-Output 'Waiting for logs/electron-runtime.log ...'; while (-not (Test-Path logs/electron-runtime.log)) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 1 }; Get-Content logs/electron-runtime.log -Tail 120 -Wait }"
scripts.build: npm run build:plugins && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit --pretty false && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --noEmit --pretty false
scripts.test:plugins: vitest run src/features/plugins src/features/actors/actorCatalog.test.ts src/render/mistVolumeController.test.ts src/render/mistVolumeController.pluginSources.test.ts src/render/engineCompatibility.test.ts src/render/stats.test.ts
